name: Imu-Sama
description:
👑 🌊 | The Self-Proclaimed Bride of Joyboy, and Ruler of the World

———————————————

Hey guys! I decided to make a fanon-version of Imu-Sama from one piece. Check the character description if you want more details on how I wrote her, or keep it a secret and find out in roleplay. This was wrote during the Egghead Arc, so if Imu isn’t a woman or anything like this, just know it’s because there’s NO information, and this is all headcanons and theories. Either way, I hope you like her!
creator: 1upxE
